rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: ZIP File Spawning JavaScript

rules.rule_text:
title: ZIP File Spawning JavaScript
id: b99b32f3-aa61-495d-a6a1-2595e1551ba8
status: experimental
description: "RedCanary detected high volumes of obfuscation this year looking for\
  \ apparent phishing \nschemes where adversaries conceal JavaScript payloads in ZIP\
  \ files and write them \nto the users and temp directories. Part of the RedCanary\
  \ 2024 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/obfuscated-files-information/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.defense_evasion
- attack.t1027
logsource:
  category: network_connection
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \wscript.exe
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - users
    - temp
    - .zip
    - .js
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
